title: matricaria australis
intro: Matricaria australis is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to Australia, known for its small yellow flowers and a pungent, bitter scent. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Matricaria australis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture, tea, or infused oil, and can be applied topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
